metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for adhd-productivity — an ADHD-style productivity & focus coaching layer for Claude Code

plugins.name: adhd-productivity
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin that turns Claude into an ADHD-optimized productivity coach and externalized executive function: one 2-minute next action at a time, working memory externalized to FOCUS.md, INCUP motivation, body-doubling, visible progress, zero shame. Works for everyday tasks and coding.
